response: On thegfx900 architecture, fallback mechanisms ensure that workloads can still execute even when certain features or optimizations are not available. Kernel dispatch involves the process of scheduling and launching kernels (functions) on the GPU. Forgfx900, this typically includes handling different execution models and ensuring efficient use of resources like compute units and shared memory. Fallback strategies might involve using alternative algorithms or reducing feature complexity to maintain performance across a wide range of workloads.
